name: drag-scroll-gallery
title: Drag Scroll Gallery
author: Parable
description: A horizontal rail you drag, flick, or wheel to scroll, with hand-written inertia, rubber-band ends, and optional flick-to-snap; items scale, tilt, and fade by distance from centre. Keyboard-navigable with role=list and focusable items, and under prefers-reduced-motion it degrades to a plain overflow-x scroller with CSS scroll-snap — no inertia or scaling.

inspiredBy.name: Skiper UI — things drag and scroll (pattern)
